positive: A stylized cosmic forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and mysterious geometric fauna in a central, symmetrical arrangement. The primary subject is a cluster of crystalline, ethereal trees with vibrant cyan and magenta glow. Deep indigo and midnight blue gradients form the background, contrasting sharply with neon green, purple, and gold accents. The style should be maximalist vaporwave meets Art Deco, highly detailed, suitable for seamless repeating textile pattern. Lighting is dramatic, emanating from the flora itself (self-illuminating). Focus on clean, defined silhouettes and strong, saturated contrast. Full body composition, vector graphic quality, high contrast black line art visible in negative space.
